description: Seed evaluation questions for RAG. Add more scenario-based (VL-SEC-019/VL-SEC-013) and glossary-based questions before running evaluation.
groundedness_note: Answers must cite Policy ID and use exact terminology from Appendix: Definitions where applicable.

questions.question: What is the failover time if the AWS primary region is unavailable, and who initiates the disaster recovery protocol?
Where is the designated safe assembly location at the UCH site in case of fire or structural emergency?
How often are backups performed, and when is restoration tested?
What is the system state for expired or suspect product where the product cannot be dispensed until cleared?
What are the core hours when employees must be available for synchronous communication, and in which time zone?
What should we do if the Solana RPC endpoint is unreachable or rate-limited, and who owns that scenario?
